metadata.title: AURA — A Space to Remember
metadata.description: A space for yoga, sauna rituals, meditation, clarity sessions, and community in Cologne.

clarityHome.heading: Clarity Sessions
clarityHome.intro: Structured 1:1 conversations for people in transitions. No advice, no methods — just clarity.
clarityHome.description: When your life looks fine on paper, but feels off inside. When you're stuck in a decision. When you sense something wants to shift — but you don't know where to.
clarityHome.arrive_text: Arriving in the present moment. Letting the noise soften so truth can be heard again.
clarityHome.uncovering_text: Uncovering patterns, thoughts, and inner narratives that have been waiting to be seen. Not fixing. Not forcing. Simply seeing.
clarityHome.recognition_text: Recognizing the essence beneath the layers. The truth. The direction. The inner knowing that was always there.
clarityHome.alignment_text: Aligning with what has been revealed. When something becomes clear, movement happens naturally.

studioTeaser.heading: AURA Studio
studioTeaser.description: Yoga, sauna rituals, meditation, and community — in a space that holds. In Uni-Center Cologne.

waitlist.heading: Be part of it from the start
waitlist.description: AURA is opening soon. As a Founding Member, you'll get early access — at a special rate, to a space that's also yours.

studio.heading: AURA Studio
studio.intro: Yoga, sauna rituals, and nervous system regulation — in a space that holds.
studio.description: Small groups. This is about you, not the perfect pose. The practice is honest and accessible.
studio.loft_heading: The Loft — the heart of AURA
studio.loft_description: Across three levels: lounge areas, a quiet gallery for journaling and conversation, a small kitchen for tea and water. Between sessions, simply be. The rhythm here happens on its own, not by schedule.
studio.yogaraum_description: The intimate space for movement and practice. Max 10–12 participants per class. Classes spread through the day: morning, noon, evening.
studio.sauna_description: Guided rituals combining breathwork, meditation, heat phases, and cold impulses. Followed by integration time in the yoga room and Loft. 8–12 participants.
studio.sauna_dropin_description: Open sauna access on selected evenings. A low-barrier community format for people from the building and neighborhood. Drop by, arrive, be.
studio.offerings_yoga_description: Small groups, max 12 people. Classes morning, noon, and evening. Practice that builds stability in the body, not performance on the mat.
studio.offerings_sauna_description: Guided rituals combining breathwork, meditation, heat, and cold. A ritual space for nervous system regulation and self-experience.
studio.offerings_meditation_description: Silent meditation, guided inner journeys, strengthening intuition. A path back to your own compass.
studio.offerings_community_description: Yoga, breathwork, sauna, and shared meals in one experience. Deeper connection beyond single sessions.
studio.location_description: In the Uni-Center, a residential complex with over 2,000 residents. Concrete, city rhythm, the pulse of life. Right in the middle: a space of stillness.
studio.kursplanDescription: We're currently building the timetable. Join the waitlist to be the first to know.

clarity.heading: Clarity Sessions
clarity.intro: Structured 1:1 conversations for moments when you need clarity. With Monika.
clarity.description: A space where you can see what is. For transitions, decisions, inner shifts. For everything that wants to be heard.
clarity.what_text: A Clarity Session is not therapy and not coaching. It is a structured conversational space where clarity emerges through deep listening, pattern recognition, and perspective shifts. Not guidance — just clear seeing.
clarity.framework_subheading: Four phases. A path to clarity.
clarity.arrive_text: Letting the noise soften so truth can be heard again. In this phase I listen patiently, mirror the current situation, and find the real topic through questions. This is about trust and connection.
clarity.uncovering_text: Uncovering patterns, thoughts, emotions, and inner narratives that have been waiting to be seen. Not fixing. Not forcing. Simply seeing and naming. In this phase we bring awareness to the dynamics beneath the surface.
clarity.recognition_text: Recognizing what lies beneath the layers. The truth. The direction. The inner knowing that was always there. What once felt tangled becomes coherent — not because something was added, but because something unnecessary fell away.
clarity.alignment_text: Aligning with what has been revealed. When something becomes clear, movement happens naturally. In this phase we integrate what has been recognized and translate it into grounded direction and a clear plan.
clarity.forwhom_text: For people in transitions, facing decisions, in inner shifts. For anyone whose life looks right on paper but feels different inside. Who sense there's more — but don't know where it leads.
clarity.pricing_note: Typically 1–4 sessions, depending on your topic.
clarity.cta_description: 15 minutes to find out if a Clarity Session is right for you.

philosophy.heading: Philosophy
philosophy.description: We believe most people simply need to remember — what they already know, already feel, already are.
philosophy.remember_text: To remember what was always there. Your own clarity, your own stillness, your own rhythm. AURA creates the space for that. Through presence.
philosophy.pillar_body_text: Yoga, movement, sauna rituals, nervous system regulation. The body as access to what we know before we think.
philosophy.pillar_clarity_text: 1:1 Clarity Sessions, meditation, inner perception. Seeing what is — without judgment, without guidance. Just clarity.
philosophy.pillar_community_text: The Loft, community experiences, shared meals, real encounters. Connection that isn't staged, but emerges.
philosophy.anticonsumption_text: Many places in our city are tied to consumption. Cafés, bars, restaurants — always with the expectation to buy something. AURA is a space where you can simply be. No obligation to consume, no expectation.
philosophy.enough_heading: I have enough. I am enough.
philosophy.enough_text: Not an affirmation, but an invitation. To stop optimizing yourself. To arrive at what is already here.
philosophy.ritualraum_text: AURA is an urban ritual space. A place designed for nervous system regulation, self-experience, and a more awake life. In Uni-Center Cologne, in the middle of everyday life.

monika.name: Monika
monika.description: Monika holds space, physically and energetically. With a background in yoga, meditation, and systemic guidance, she creates places where people are free to remember.
